helpCenter.findAnswers: Find answers to your questions here

faqs.q1: How do I book a lesson?
faqs.a1: Browse available lessons on the home screen, view details and tap "Register" to book.
faqs.q2: How do I become an instructor?
faqs.a2: Go to Profile > "Become an Instructor" and follow the steps to submit your application.
faqs.q3: How do I cancel a booking?
faqs.a3: Go to "My Lessons", find the lesson and tap cancel. Please check cancellation policies.
faqs.q4: How do I change my password?
faqs.a5: You can contact us via WhatsApp or email using the contact info provided in the app.

about.description: Feriha Dance Platform is a modern platform that brings dance enthusiasts together with the best instructors. You can take lessons in Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba, Tango, and Modern dance styles, create your own lessons, and be part of the dance community.
about.descriptionCodecanyon: Dancer Community is a comprehensive platform that brings dance enthusiasts together. You can take lessons in Salsa, Bachata, Kizomba, Tango, and Modern dance styles, create lessons as an instructor, and be an active member of the dance community with live chat features.
about.copyright: © 2024 Feriha Dance Platform. All rights reserved.

school.onboardingDesc: Fill out the following information completely so students can get to know your school better.
school.verificationStepDesc: You are just a few small steps away from starting your school journey. Let's set up your profile!
school.onboardingRequiredDesc: Please complete your school profile (onboarding) before creating a lesson.
school.uploadDocumentsDesc: To publish lessons as a school, you must upload your documents approved by the MEB or Ministry of Youth and Sports.
school.verificationPendingDesc: The documents you uploaded are being checked. After approval, you can publish your lessons and contact us via WhatsApp.
school.draftLimitReachedDesc: As an unverified school, you can create up to 3 draft lessons. Please upload your documents to continue.
school.activateLessonVerificationDesc: Your school must be verified to publish the lesson.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.section1Content: When you use our app, we may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and payment information. This information is used to provide and improve our services.
privacyPolicy.section2Content: The information we collect is used to process your lesson bookings, manage your payments, provide customer support, and deliver personalized content to you.
privacyPolicy.section3Content: We do not share your personal information with third parties except as required by law. Secure payment providers are used for payment processing.
privacyPolicy.section4Content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. However, no internet transmission or electronic storage system is 100% secure.
privacyPolicy.section5Content: Our app may use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience. These technologies help us remember your preferences and analyze your app usage.
privacyPolicy.section6Content: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or request data portability of your personal information. You can contact us to exercise these rights.
privacyPolicy.section7Content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes.
privacyPolicy.contactContent: If you have questions about our privacy policy, please contact us at support@danceplatform.com.
